nodes.context: Neighborhood-based gang in Charlotte, North Carolina, originally a branch of Queen City Kings.
Gang formed in Charlotte, North Carolina, by People Nation and Folk Nation members from Chicago.
Gang with which Hidden Valley Kings have had altercations.
Criminal organization listed as an ally of Hidden Valley Kings.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang was formed in the late 1990s to early 2000s, as a branch of the Queen City Kings
edges.context: Hidden Valley Kings originated as a branch of Queen City Kings.

edges.evidence_quote: The Queen City Kings were formed simultaneously by both People Nation and Folk Nation members who moved to Charlotte, North Carolina from Chicago, Illinois in the early to mid 1990s.
edges.context: Queen City Kings was formed by members of People Nation and Folk Nation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Queen City Kings were formed simultaneously by both People Nation and Folk Nation members who moved to Charlotte, North Carolina from Chicago, Illinois in the early to mid 1990s.
edges.context: Queen City Kings was formed by members of People Nation and Folk Nation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hidden Valley Kings don't have many known enemies, but within the neighborhood members have been known to have altercations with the United Blood Nation.
edges.context: Hidden Valley Kings have had altercations with United Blood Nation.
Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of Hidden Valley Kings in the infobox.
